title: Horror.Place Consent State Machine
description: Canonical consent state machine for user accounts, defining tiers, transitions, and proof requirements.

defaultState.description: Name of the default consent state for new or unverified users.

states.description: List of all consent states available in the constellation.

id.description: Machine-readable identifier for this consent state.

ageTier.description: Age classification associated with this state.

policyTier.description: High-level policy envelope tier this state maps to.

allowedContentProfile.description: Summary of content allowances for this state.

allowPsychologicalHorror.description: Whether atmospheric and psychological horror is allowed.

allowImpliedViolence.description: Whether implied or off-screen violence is allowed.

allowExplicitViolence.description: Whether explicit, on-screen violence is allowed.

allowSexualContent.description: Whether consensual, non-violent sexual content is allowed.

allowSexualViolence.description: Whether sexual violence is allowed. This should remain false in all shipped configurations.

explicitnessCapsRef.description: Optional reference to an explicitness caps object or schema (e.g., consent-explicitness-caps) for this state.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes for governance and documentation.

transitions.description: Allowed transitions between consent states, including proof and opt-in requirements.

allowedForAgeTier.description: Age tiers for which this transition is legally/ethically allowed.

requiresExplicitOptIn.description: If true, user must perform an explicit opt-in action (e.g., acknowledgment screen) for this transition.

requiresProof.description: List of proof roles required to approve this transition.

items.description: Proof role identifier, e.g., age-gating, jurisdiction-compliance, research-charter.

cooldownDays.description: Minimum number of days that must elapse before this transition can be requested again after a downgrade or refusal.

requiresHumanReview.description: If true, transition must be approved by a human governance process (e.g., for research-tier access).

autoDowngradeOnBreach.description: If true, policy breaches at the target state may trigger automatic downgrade back to the source or a safer state.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes for this transition.

metadata.description: Metadata for versioning and governance of the state machine.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this consent state machine definition.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this state machine definition was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this state machine definition was last updated.

author.description: Identifier for the author or tool that produced this configuration.

jurisdictionProfile.description: Optional identifier for a jurisdictional or regulatory profile this machine is tuned for.
